title: deyeuxia scabra
intro: Deyeuxia scabra, also known as the rough dew grass, is a type of grass native to China, characterized by its distinctive hairy leaves and purple or white flowers. The plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving headaches, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Deyeuxia scabra can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, as well as being used in traditional herbal remedies in the form of decoctions or poultices.
